message:
test: integration test for telemetry registry → drift detection → metric export

Chains MetricRegistry (histograms/counters) → DriftMonitor (ADWIN rate
change detection) → MetricPoint (tagged structured export). 6 tests
covering registry→drift feeding, drift→metric-point export, collector
snapshot coherence, multi-rule tracking, histogram quantiles driving
drift thresholds, and the full pipeline end-to-end.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
